$schema_comment: Canonical lock: each grid's vital infrastructure is bound to exactly one biological operator attribution. Changes require HITL and version bump.

policy.summary: Mesh nodes that participate in Level-0 vitals and static outbox MUST declare a grid_id that matches this manifest. Each grid lists allowed mesh_node ids and the biological operator who holds vital authority for that grid.
policy.enforcement: tools/nexa_vitals.py validates mesh_status.json against this file; set NEXA_GRID_LOCK_STRICT=1 to fail non-zero on drift.

HITL-HQ-BOUCHARD-001.notes: Example of a partner utility grid: vital infrastructure for this slice is locked to this named biological operator until HITL updates this manifest. Add attestations (e.g. signed operator registry entry) when formally recorded.

vital_infrastructure.notes: Operator phones and primary VPS carry authoritative mesh presence for vitals publication.
Edge nodes report into mesh; vital publication remains under primary grid unless separately attested.
Compute grid; same biological operator attribution as primary sovereignty unless HITL assigns a distinct operator_ref.

Illustrative binding: Level-0 vitals and mesh nodes listed here are attributed to Claudine Bouchard as the biological operator for this partner grid. Replace hydro-quebec-interop with production node IDs when provisioned; bump manifest version on any change.
